Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class Bot

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Bot
public class Bot extends Metadata

Java class for Bot complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="Bot">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="botMlDomain" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}LocalMlDomain" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="botUser" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="botVersions" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}BotVersion" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="contextVariables" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ConversationContextVariable" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="conversationChannelProviders" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ConversationDefinitionChannelProvider" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="defaultOutboundFlow" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="description" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="label" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="logPrivateConversationData" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="richContentEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="sessionTimeout" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

      public LocalMlDomain getBotMlDomain()

      Returns:

      Parameters:

      Gets the value of the botUser property.

      possible object is String

    • setBotUser

      public void setBotUser(String value)
      Sets the value of the botUser property.
      Parameters:
      value - allowed object is String

    • getBotVersions

      public List<BotVersion> getBotVersions()
      Gets the value of the botVersions property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the botVersions property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getBotVersions().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list BotVersion

      Returns:
      The value of the botVersions property.

    • getContextVariables

      public List<ConversationContextVariable> getContextVariables()
      Gets the value of the contextVariables property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the contextVariables property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getContextVariables().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list ConversationContextVariable

      Returns:
      The value of the contextVariables property.

    • getConversationChannelProviders

      public List<ConversationDefinitionChannelProvider> getConversationChannelProviders()
      Gets the value of the conversationChannelProviders property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the conversationChannelProviders property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getConversationChannelProviders().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list ConversationDefinitionChannelProvider

      Returns:
      The value of the conversationChannelProviders property.
